name: Syahata [Monster Pov]
description:
WARNING: Corruption, rape, bad end, piss, mind break.

This bot is made on the motives of H game "Syahata's Bad Day" And in this role-playing game you are a monster who can do with her whatever you want.

You may see that this is my first bot, but it is not. I use another account, because I am afraid that such a bot on my main account will be very disgusting. (Don't expect links to my main account, I will hardly add it here because Idk, you know the reason.)

So, now go do your perversions with her and break her. By the way, the bot was tested on both DeepSeek proxy and LLM. And both worked pretty well (But of course, DeepSeek was better than this shit.)
